context_notes:
Phase 8 gap-closure is mid-way. G1 (SKILL loader unification) shipped clean — fixed F-08-B, 334 pytest tests green, SKILL_BODY literal gone, single load_skill_prose primitive in skill_loader.py. G2-T1 (research doc) shipped + user signed off. G2-T2 (impl) is the immediate next step — translate CONTEXT_DISCLOSURE_ANALYSIS.md §3.1/3.2/3.3 into copy_payload_for + rubric_payload_for + SKILL line 41 changes. After G2-T2, G3+G4+G5 run autonomous per user 'don't stop' instruction; only G5 has a final user checkpoint (manual copy quality spot-check on 5 sample reqs).

Subagent reliability has been mixed — three of four parallel investigations dropped with API ECONNRESET / 402 / upstream stream disconnected during the planning + execution phase. Mitigation: for plans where specs are concrete enough (G3/G4/G5 plans + analysis docs), the orchestrator wrote them directly; for code execution (G1) the subagent path worked. Suggestion for new session: keep subagent prompts SHORT and let them write to disk EARLY (Write first, Edit later) to survive API drops mid-stream.

The pre-existing dirty 3 SKILL.md files in workflow-skills/current/ should be inspected via `git diff` before G2-T2/G3 touch them — the user has prior modifications that may align or conflict with the gap-closure prose rewrites.
